title: The Centre Barely Hangs On And Inflation Is Only Moderating
section_path: The Centre Barely Hangs On And Inflation Is Only Moderating
section_path_text: The Centre Barely Hangs On And Inflation Is Only Moderating
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
Market performance in equities and bonds has improved on the back of a narrative which sees good electoral outcomes and lower inflation. The case for bullishness on these factors is not as clear cut as it may seem. Centrist policies in Europe are still under fire, and US inflation coming down will likely continue to be a bumpy ride.
